prompt: Create an ultra-detailed studio “Mini Me family portrait” featuring one real-looking central person and exactly eight miniature childlike clones of him, all sharing the same facial identity, skin tone, short black haircut, expressive dark eyes, eyebrows, nose, lips, ears, smile shape, and overall facial proportions. The central subject is a young Black man named the subject, seated front-and-center in a wicker peacock chair, facing the camera with a calm neutral expression. He wears a navy T-shirt with a distressed Texas-flag-style design, ripped blue jeans, white high-top sneakers, and a wristwatch. Around him are exactly 8 Mini Me versions: 1) a smiling mini sitting on the top left edge of the chair back, legs dangling; 2) a mini standing at far left near a potted palm with arms crossed and a confident side glance; 3) a mini sitting on stacked vintage brown suitcases at bottom left, looking upward thoughtfully; 4) a mini leaning against the man’s left thigh with chin resting on hands, gazing up admiringly; 5) a mini sitting on a small wooden stool at right, smiling toward the man; 6) a mini standing behind the stool on the right, holding a camera up as if photographing the scene; 7) a mini lying on his stomach on the floor at bottom right, drawing a pencil portrait in a spiral sketchbook; 8) a mini partially perched behind the central subject’s left shoulder/upper chair area, playful and cheerful. Dress every Mini Me in matching navy Texas-flag T-shirts, blue jeans, and white sneakers, scaled proportionally, with cute toddler-like bodies but identical recognizable face and hairstyle. Use a warm professional portrait studio setting with a mottled brown textured backdrop, woven jute rug, wicker chair, potted palm on the left, wooden side table on the right with a small plant, vintage leather suitcases, a pencil cup with colored pencils, and the open sketchbook showing a face drawing. Lighting should be cinematic warm softbox lighting, gentle shadows, high realism, sharp facial detail, rich skin tones, subtle depth of field, cozy earthy color palette, vertical 4:5 composition, no text, no watermark, no extra characters, and make all nine figures feel physically present in the same scene.
